candidates.snippet: based on the stencil letters of Jean Gabriel Bery. Bery Script is part of the Stencil Fonts Series and was released in 2012. Jean Gabriel Bery was a Paris stencil maker whose atelier was located on the Pont Notre-Dame.

F, TTF, WOFF, and WOFF2 formats. Legacy font formats are available on request. The Stencil Fonts Series was launched on April 19 2012 to accompany the exhibition 'Between Writing & Type: the Stencil Letter' held at Catap
